_description: 装饰表 - Maple Town 每个建筑的装饰物配置

decorations.name: Coffee Cup Charm
decorations.description: A cute coffee cup charm from your first visit to Fog & Brew. A memento of your first successful order!
decorations.description_cn: 你第一次在Fog & Brew点单成功的纪念——一个可爱的咖啡杯挂件。

decorations.name: Barista Apron
decorations.description: The apron you wore when you worked behind the counter. 'Forced to work' never looked so good!
decorations.description_cn: 你站柜台接单时穿的围裙。'被迫营业'从没这么好看过！

decorations.name: Mei's Secret Latte Recipe
decorations.description: Mei's handwritten latte recipe card — the secret weapon that turned Karen's frown upside down.
decorations.description_cn: Mei亲手写的拿铁配方卡——让差评客人转怒为笑的秘密武器。

decorations.name: Old Chen's Shopping Bag
decorations.description: A sturdy reusable bag from Mirror Mart. Old Chen gave it to you after your first successful shopping trip.
decorations.description_cn: Mirror Mart的结实购物袋。你第一次成功购物后Old Chen送给你的。

decorations.name: Old Chen's Secret Hot Sauce
decorations.description: A bottle of Old Chen's homemade hot sauce — 'On the house', he said. Tough on the outside, soft on the inside.
decorations.description_cn: Old Chen的自制辣酱——'On the house'，他说。嘴硬心软的老头。
